calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion For Entry Of Default Judgment For Damages
Off Calendar Dec-13-2011 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Ellen Chaitin, Clerk: S. Vantree, CSR: L. Gillian #12355.

Leonard P. Mastromonaco, Esq. appeared for plaintiff(s) Mission-Taylor Properties.
Plaintiff's Witness: Cindy Mason was placed under oath and direct examined.

Order waiving witness appearance at default prove-up hearing was in file.

Default has been entered against the Defendant(s).

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff(s), and against the Defaulted Defendant(s) CamKal Industrial Transport, Aleta Bryant and George Drake for Judgment as follows:

Damages/Principal - $ 203,687.80
Prejudgment Interest - $ 2,372.27
Attorney's Fees - $ 18,249.50
Costs - $ 1000.00
Total judgment in the amount of $ 225,053.99
